'''Consolidated Learning Systems''' was a manufacturer of consumer electronics and appliances, as well as business and military computer systems. They were one of the [[voting sponsor]]s of the [[Corporate Sector Authority/Legends|Corporate Sector Authority]], investing in the region following the signing of the [[Corporate Sector Charter]].<ref name="HSCS" />
